name: d3-force
when_to_use: 要自定义力学布局(粒子/弹簧-质点/聚类/蜂群/圆填充,乃至非图的力模拟)时用这个底层求解器,每帧读 node.x/node.y 自己画。只想画现成节点-连线关系图用 force-graph 更省事——它不负责渲染。
why_valuable: velocity-Verlet 积分 + Barnes–Hut n-body 多体力求解器,可叠加自定义力(引力/斥力/碰撞/向心/link 弹簧);AI 徒手写 n-body 会 O(n²) 卡死或数值发散,稳定收敛的力求解原生做不好。

en.when_to_use: Use this low-level solver when you need a custom force layout (particles, spring-mass systems, clustering, swarms, circle packing, or even non-graph force simulation), reading node.x/node.y each frame and drawing it yourself. If you only want a ready-made node-link graph, force-graph is easier; this package does not render.
en.why_valuable: A velocity-Verlet integrator plus a Barnes-Hut n-body solver lets you combine custom forces (attraction, repulsion, collision, centering, and link springs); AI-written n-body code either stalls at O(n^2) or diverges numerically, so native implementations do not converge stably.

data_in.note: Hard rule: links use source/target (opposite vis-network's from/to); node objects are mutated in place with x/y/vx/vy; forceLink().id(d=>d.id) must match your node id field, otherwise source/target are resolved as array indexes.

nodes.x?: number -- initial position; internally positioned when omitted
nodes.fx?: number | null -- fixed x (dragging/anchoring); set to null to unlock

links.source: string | number | node -- references node.id (with .id()) or an array index
links.target: string | number | node -- same as above

data_in.note: 铁律:links 用 source/target(与 vis-network 的 from/to 相反);节点对象被原地 mutate 加上 x/y/vx/vy;forceLink().id(d=>d.id) 要对上你的 node id 字段,否则 source/target 按数组索引解析。

nodes.id?: string | number —— 供 forceLink().id() 匹配
nodes.x?: number —— 初始位置,省略则内部自动布点
nodes.fx?: number | null —— 固定 x(拖拽/锚定),置 null 解锁

links.source: string | number | node —— 引用 node.id(配 .id())或数组索引

provides._note: headless-primitive:纯 JS 求解器,无渲染;每 tick 读节点坐标自绘。
provides.outputs: 原地 mutate 每个 node 的 x/y/vx/vy;可组合 charge(斥力)/link(弹簧)/center/collide(碰撞)/x/y/radial 力;tick 事件驱动交互式渲染。

api_surface.sim: forceSimulation(nodes) 自动启动内部计时器;.on('tick', cb);.stop();.tick(iters) 手动推进;.alpha()/.alphaTarget()/.restart()
api_surface.forces: forceManyBody().strength(k) / forceLink(links).id(fn).distance(d) / forceCenter(x,y) / forceCollide(r) / forceX / forceY / forceRadial
api_surface.fix: 在 node 上设 fx/fy 固定,置 null 解锁

peer.note: 只想要现成关系图渲染用 force-graph;d3-force 是它底层同族的物理求解器,适合自定义/非图的力学布局,自绘每帧。

boot.note: 求解器,非渲染器:每 tick 读 node.x/node.y 画进自建 canvas/SVG(定高 px 禁 vh)。links 用 source/target(非 from/to)。内部用 d3-timer(rAF)驱动,冷却(alpha→alphaMin)后自停;需提前停调 sim.stop()。

isolation.evidence: API correct: +esm exports named forceSimulation, forceManyBody, forceLink, forceCenter, forceCollide, forceX, forceY, forceRadial (export{P as forceCenter, b as forceCollide, H as forceLink, k as forceManyBody, q as forceRadial, Z as forceSimulation, _ as forceX, nn as forceY}) — verified. README@3: forceSimulation([nodes]) auto-starts; simulation.on('tick', …) render pattern; nodes gain x/y/vx/vy; node.fx/fy pin; forceLink applies to source and target of each link (source/target semantics, .id() to map). No DOM output, no stylesheet, no window event listeners — the only global is an internal requestAnimationFrame timer (d3-timer) that self-stops on cooldown or via .stop(). Shadow-safe: consumer renders into its own surface.
